_Jwt_NOTE: Set Jwt:SecretKey via: dotnet user-secrets set 'Jwt:SecretKey' 'dev-only-secret-key-replace-in-production-min-32-chars!'
_Tenancy_NOTE: Set connection strings via: dotnet user-secrets set 'ConnectionStrings:CatalogConnection' 'Server=localhost;Database=ZentechCatalog;Trusted_Connection=True;TrustServerCertificate=True'
